title: T-026 — Wiring: ATP swab auto-fail trigger (V-TEC-44) + WO close gate emit
prompt:
# T-026 — Wiring: ATP swab auto-fail trigger (V-TEC-44) + WO close gate emit

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §10.6, §10.8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
DB trigger + service ensuring ATP swab fail propagates and emits outbox event.

Threshold default 10 RLU pulled from reference_tables.alert_thresholds.row_key='atp_swab_rlu_max'. Outbox event payload: { item_id, work_order_id, test_code, result_value, threshold_rlu }. The 08-PRODUCTION close gate consumer is downstream — only emit here.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- db/migrations/0xxx_atp_autofail_trigger.sql [create]
- lib/technical/lab/atp-fail.ts [create]
- tests/wiring/atp-fail.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Allergen changeover gate
- WO state machine

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given direct INSERT into lab_results with test_type='atp_swab', value=15, threshold=10, when committed, then result_status='fail'.
2. Given fail row written, when outbox queue inspected, then 'lab.fail' event present with item_id and value.
3. Given test_type='allergen_elisa' and result_status='pass' provided, when inserted, then trigger does not modify status.

## Test strategy
- RED tests covering DB trigger + outbox emit.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/atp-fail.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not consume the event here (08-PRODUCTION side).
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
